name: Zombie Parade Defense 6
description: Zombie Parade Defense continues with its 6th episode. This time you have to defend at 10 different stages. Enemies will get stronger with each stage. Dont forget to visit the Market section for upgrading weapons and an extra health bar etc.
instructions: Player 1 Move W A S D Hit C Grenade V Reload X Jump W Walk on the wall Switch weapon Q-E Player 2 Move ARROW KEYS Hit L Grenade K Reload J Jump UP ARROW KEY Walk on the wall Switch weapon P
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, Battle, War, Zombie
